scripts.dev:codex-tag: pnpm --filter @hunvreus/heypi run build && pnpm --filter heypi-example-codex-tag run dev
scripts.publish:dry: pnpm run build && npm publish --workspaces --ignore-scripts --dry-run --access public --tag latest
scripts.publish:packages: pnpm run build && npm publish --workspaces --ignore-scripts --access public --tag latest
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @hunvreus/heypi run build && pnpm -r --filter "./packages/*" run test
